testcase.name: test_create_shopping_item
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inventory_stock_tracking.py:322: in test_create_shopping_item assert create_response.status_code == 200, f"Create failed: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Create failed: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_shopping_item_has_monthly_quantity
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inventory_stock_tracking.py:346: in test_shopping_item_has_monthly_quantity assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_mark_as_purchased_creates_inventory_item
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inventory_stock_tracking.py:375: in test_mark_as_purchased_creates_inventory_item assert shop_response.status_code == 200 E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_delete_shopping_item_after_purchase
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inventory_stock_tracking.py:508: in test_delete_shopping_item_after_purchase assert shop_response.status_code == 200 E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_inventory_model_has_current_stock

failure.message: AssertionError: current_stock field should exist in inventory items. Got: dict_keys(['id', 'household_id', 'name_en', 'name_hi', 'name_mr', 'category', 'stock_level', 'freshness', 'is_secret_stash', 'unit', 'expiry_date', 'barcode', 'monthly_quantity', 'monthly_unit', 'reserved_for', 'last_updated_by', 'created_at']) assert ('current_stock' in {'barcode': None, 'category': 'household', 'created_at': '2026-02-04T17:36:29.317217+00:00', 'expiry_date': None, ...} or None is not None or 'current_stock' in "{'id': '0dd54a14-9868-4041-8d6a-540837a623fd', 'household_id': '6a0c5520-d46b-46a7-8303-e754966a4e10', 'name_en': 'Naphthalene Balls', 'name_hi': 'नेफ़थलीन की गेंदें', 'name_mr': 'नॅप्थलीन गोळ्या', 'category': 'household', 'stock_level': 'empty', 'freshness': None, 'is_secret_stash': False, 'unit': 'pcs', 'expiry_date': None, 'barcode': None, 'monthly_quantity': None, 'monthly_unit': None, 'reserved_for': [], 'last_updated_by': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-04T17:36:29.317217+00:00'}") + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfee4042e7b00>('current_stock') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfee4042e7b00> = {'barcode': None, 'category': 'household', 'created_at': '2026-02-04T17:36:29.317217+00:00', 'expiry_date': None, ...}.get + and "{'id': '0dd54a14-9868-4041-8d6a-540837a623fd', 'household_id': '6a0c5520-d46b-46a7-8303-e754966a4e10', 'name_en': 'Naphthalene Balls', 'name_hi': 'नेफ़थलीन की गेंदें', 'name_mr': 'नॅप्थलीन गोळ्या', 'category': 'household', 'stock_level': 'empty', 'freshness': None, 'is_secret_stash': False, 'unit': 'pcs', 'expiry_date': None, 'barcode': None, 'monthly_quantity': None, 'monthly_unit': None, 'reserved_for': [], 'last_updated_by': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-04T17:36:29.317217+00:00'}" = str({'barcode': None, 'category': 'household', 'created_at': '2026-02-04T17:36:29.317217+00:00', 'expiry_date': None, ...})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_inventory_stock_tracking.py:550: in test_inventory_model_has_current_stock assert "current_stock" in first_item or first_item.get("current_stock") is not None or "current_stock" in str(first_item), \ E AssertionError: current_stock field should exist in inventory items. Got: dict_keys(['id', 'household_id', 'name_en', 'name_hi', 'name_mr', 'category', 'stock_level', 'freshness', 'is_secret_stash', 'unit', 'expiry_date', 'barcode', 'monthly_quantity', 'monthly_unit', 'reserved_for', 'last_updated_by', 'created_at']) E assert ('current_stock' in {'barcode': None, 'category': 'household', 'created_at': '2026-02-04T17:36:29.317217+00:00', 'expiry_date': None, ...} or None is not None or 'current_stock' in "{'id': '0dd54a14-9868-4041-8d6a-540837a623fd', 'household_id': '6a0c5520-d46b-46a7-8303-e754966a4e10', 'name_en': 'Naphthalene Balls', 'name_hi': 'नेफ़थलीन की गेंदें', 'name_mr': 'नॅप्थलीन गोळ्या', 'category': 'household', 'stock_level': 'empty', 'freshness': None, 'is_secret_stash': False, 'unit': 'pcs', 'expiry_date': None, 'barcode': None, 'monthly_quantity': None, 'monthly_unit': None, 'reserved_for': [], 'last_updated_by': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-04T17:36:29.317217+00:00'}") E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfee4042e7b00>('current_stock') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfee4042e7b00> = {'barcode': None, 'category': 'household', 'created_at': '2026-02-04T17:36:29.317217+00:00', 'expiry_date': None, ...}.get E + and "{'id': '0dd54a14-9868-4041-8d6a-540837a623fd', 'household_id': '6a0c5520-d46b-46a7-8303-e754966a4e10', 'name_en': 'Naphthalene Balls', 'name_hi': 'नेफ़थलीन की गेंदें', 'name_mr': 'नॅप्थलीन गोळ्या', 'category': 'household', 'stock_level': 'empty', 'freshness': None, 'is_secret_stash': False, 'unit': 'pcs', 'expiry_date': None, 'barcode': None, 'monthly_quantity': None, 'monthly_unit': None, 'reserved_for': [], 'last_updated_by': None, 'created_at': '2026-02-04T17:36:29.317217+00:00'}" = str({'barcode': None, 'category': 'household', 'created_at': '2026-02-04T17:36:29.317217+00:00', 'expiry_date': None, ...})
